zone_id: # zone_id                    = unique id matching your world data zone rows
# zone_name                  = human readable name for logging
# radius_near                = units — entities inside this get full frequent updates
# radius_far                 = units — entities between near and far get reduced updates
# update_frequency_near_sec  = how often to send near entity updates (lower = more frequent)
# update_frequency_far_sec   = how often to send far entity updates (lower = more frequent)
# max_entities_tracked       = hard cap on entities tracked per player in this zone
# sync_frequency_sec         = how often world state is synced for this zone
# priority                   = lower number = higher priority when server is under load

zone_name: higher frequency — lots happening in a small space
